{{CargoClone
|name=Tenkou
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=154
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Refine +1 White Rebel Material +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Water DMG +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Water DMG +1.5%
|}}
